reactions.label: no_position
reactions.interest: employers' and the tech sector's skills pipeline
reactions.public_good_frame: the country's competitiveness is set in its classrooms
reactions.argument: Admission mechanics within the same structure do not change the skills output we depend on; we defer to others on fairness design.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: employers' and the tech sector's skills pipeline
reactions.public_good_frame: the country's competitiveness is set in its classrooms
reactions.argument: We can live with fewer selective places if the maths-science talent pipeline is preserved through advanced programmes.
reactions.condition_to_change: Advanced STEM programmes guaranteed in every region.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.basis: baseline skills of the whole cohort
reactions.interest: employers' and the tech sector's skills pipeline
reactions.public_good_frame: the country's competitiveness is set in its classrooms
reactions.argument: A comprehensive school can serve the economy if digital and foundational skills are funded seriously across the board.
reactions.condition_to_change: A costed digital-skills programme inside the reform, not beside it.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: employers' and the tech sector's skills pipeline
reactions.public_good_frame: the country's competitiveness is set in its classrooms
reactions.argument: Lifting the general schools raises the skill floor of the entire future workforce — the highest-return investment on this list.
reactions.condition_to_change: Employers should be consulted on the skills content of the compensation package.
